title: Chest X-Ray Image Tracing
description: Trained CNNs in Keras/TensorFlow on chest X-rays to detect pneumothorax at 92.6% accuracy, with Python/NumPy preprocessing for 10,000+ images. Integrated predictions into a React prototype with SQL-backed APIs so clinicians could explore results and track model performance.

title: Robotics Manufacturing QA System
description: Built Flask microservices in Docker for screw and weld inspection with sub-second latency and automated good/bad detection across large inspection volumes. Shipped a React/Figma operator dashboard on PostgreSQL for defect trends and custom reports, cutting manual QA time by about 22%.

title: Student Budget Tracker
description: Created a web app for students to track spending categories, set monthly limits, and visualize trends with simple charts and summaries.

title: Course Planner Assistant
description: Built a planner that helps map prerequisite chains and quarter-by-quarter course schedules based on major requirements and user constraints.

title: Recipe Recommendation Engine
description: Implemented a recommendation pipeline that scores recipes by user preferences, dietary restrictions, and ingredient overlap.

title: Transit Delay Analyzer
description: Analyzed public transit data to identify peak delay periods and route bottlenecks, then summarized findings in an interactive dashboard.

title: Campus Event Finder
description: Developed a search and filter interface for campus events with category tags, date filters, and bookmark functionality.

title: Housing Price Explorer
description: Built a map-first data explorer for neighborhood-level housing prices, trends, and comparisons across selected time ranges.

title: Workout Progress Journal
description: Created a tracker for sets, reps, and personal records with weekly progress snapshots and trend summaries.

title: Climate Data Snapshot Tool
description: Prepared a lightweight tool to summarize temperature and precipitation shifts by city using yearly aggregation and anomaly flags.

title: Music Trends Dashboard
description: Designed a dashboard to compare top tracks, genres, and audio features over time for exploratory analysis.

title: Volunteer Hours Portal
description: Implemented a portal for logging volunteer activities, verifying entries, and generating semester summary reports.
